reason: Defines preload-to-bridge-to-Pinia runtime state contracts, settlement, persistence, and automation scheduling behavior.
Requires shared bridge contracts in src/types.ts and synchronized real/fallback implementations.
Defines TypeScript and build quality gates for frontend/store changes.
Defines process exit/error semantics and uTools lifecycle cleanup boundaries.
Defines process lifecycle event attribution and user-visible exit logging contracts.
The automation run identity must round-trip across store, bridge, preload cache, and recovery.
Requires searching all bridge/cache call sites before changing shared identifiers and APIs.
